_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002. Shape additions that preserve wire compatibility (new optional response fields) are allowed; breaking changes require a new generation.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Classic returns 404 NOT_FOUND when nothing is ready (not 200 with empty body); loom matches that, just with the IssueLoom shape on success. The fresh-DB-after-initialize() state is NOT empty: filigree's workflow packs auto-seed a default 'Future' release issue, so claim-next on an unmodified test DB returns that issue. The success-shape replay below relies on that seeding.

shape_decl.rationale: Atomically claims the highest-priority ready issue. 404 NOT_FOUND with code NOT_FOUND when no ready issues exist (verified by the test_full_lifecycle_pins_issue_loom_shape end-state, which exhausts the queue).

examples.name: success_default_ready_release
examples.note: Replays against the dashboard_surface fixture, which has an initialized DB with the auto-seeded 'Future' release as the highest-priority (P4) ready issue. The IssueLoom shape is pinned by _assert_shape_matches against the body below; values are placeholders (only types are checked).
